assumptions: The developer has a terminal, Node.js/npx, and a local project directory.
No PostHog Cloud account or project instrumentation exists yet.
The project uses a framework the wizard lists as supported.

developer_goal: Create or authenticate a PostHog Cloud account via the official wizard and reach the documented project-onboarded state.

first_success.outcome: The PostHog wizard finishes and the project is onboarded with installed SDKs, credentials, instrumentation, and generated insights/dashboards.
first_success.observable_signal: The interactive wizard command completes and docs state the project is onboarded; developer is told to test the setup.

route_selection.surface: PostHog AI wizard CLI (documented default integration)
route_selection.rule: Prefer the vendor's documented recommended/default installation method when it is an explicit first route.
route_selection.selected: AI wizard default integration with --signup for a new account

candidates.name: AI wizard with --signup (new account)
candidates.reason: Official wizard-signup docs present this as the fastest zero-to-events path and create account + project from one command; product-analytics install docs call the wizard the default method.

candidates.name: AI wizard against an existing account
candidates.reason: Assumes a prior PostHog account rather than starting at account creation.

candidates.name: Manual SDK installation
candidates.reason: Docs route unsupported frameworks here and recommend the wizard as default when supported.

candidates.name: Self-hosted PostHog
candidates.reason: Adds infrastructure deployment beyond the Cloud wizard path.

required_path.action: In the project directory, run the wizard signup command with email and region.

required_fields.label: --region (us or eu)
required_fields.notes: Region is fixed at account creation.

required_path.observable_result: The wizard begins OAuth/PKCE provisioning of a new PostHog account and project.

required_path.action: Complete any interactive wizard prompts required for the detected framework until instrumentation finishes.

required_fields.label: Framework-specific interactive prompts
required_fields.notes: Docs enumerate wizard operations and supported frameworks but do not publish a stable prompt transcript.

required_path.observable_result: SDKs are installed, credentials written, and code instrumented for the detected app.

required_path.action: Open the welcome email and set a password so the PostHog app can be used later.

required_fields.label: Password set via welcome email link

required_path.observable_result: The developer can sign in at us.posthog.com or eu.posthog.com for the chosen region.

required_path.action: Test the setup after the wizard completes.

required_fields.label: Project-specific verification action
required_fields.notes: Docs say to test after completion but do not prescribe one universal app action or UI event check.

required_path.observable_result: The developer confirms the onboarded integration behaves as expected.

prerequisites.description: A local project using a wizard-supported framework.

external_gates.description: Region choice is permanent for the new Cloud account.
Welcome-email delivery is required to set a browser login password.

unavoidable_waits.description: Wizard must download, authenticate via OAuth/PKCE, provision the project, and finish instrumentation.
PostHog must deliver the welcome email before password setup.

platform_outcomes.description: Wizard creates the account and project and returns project API key and host.
Wizard installs SDKs, writes env credentials, instruments client/server code, and can generate insights and dashboards.

excluded.reason: Documented as recommended, not required for first onboarding.
Open beta follow-on after events are already captured.
Signup via wizard does not mint one by default; only needed for later scripts/API use.

uncertainties.question: What exact interactive prompts and file edits does the wizard require for a given supported repository?
uncertainties.impact: Required developer actions and fields after the initial command cannot be listed as a stable path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated transcript from running the signup wizard on one named supported framework template repository.

uncertainties.question: Is wizard completion alone the first-success terminal, or is a specific first captured event/UI check required?
uncertainties.impact: Whether step 4 is required changes action counts and the observable signal.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Clarify against official onboarding success criteria whether 'project is onboarded' is sufficient without a universal event-verification action.
